================================================================================
TAI ERLANG AUTONOMICS: COMPREHENSIVE RISK MANAGEMENT SYSTEM
Weeks 1-13 Execution Risk Assessment & Mitigation Planning
================================================================================

DATE: January 26, 2026
STATUS: COMPLETE AND READY FOR USE
MISSION: Identify, monitor, mitigate 13 critical risks to first revenue

================================================================================
DELIVERABLES CREATED
================================================================================

✅ RISK_MANAGEMENT.md (15,000 words)
   └─ Comprehensive analysis of 13 business risks
   └─ Risk severity matrix (RED/AMBER/YELLOW)
   └─ For each risk: What could go wrong + Why it matters + Warning signals 
      + Mitigation strategy + Contingency plan + Escalation procedures
   └─ Risk monitoring dashboard + Weekly review template
   └─ Contingency budget allocation ($35K)

✅ CONTINGENCY_PROCEDURES.md (12,000 words)
   └─ 7 detailed contingency playbooks with step-by-step execution
   └─ Each contingency: Immediate response (24h) + Mitigation + Fallbacks
   └─ Decision trees for determining which contingency to activate
   └─ Post-incident protocols + Lessons learned framework
   └─ 24-hour, 1-week, and multi-week timelines for each scenario

✅ RISK_CONTINGENCY_QUICK_REFERENCE.md (2,500 words)
   └─ 1-page cheat sheet for emergency activation
   └─ RED alert triggers (immediate escalation)
   └─ Contingency summary table (13 contingencies × key info)
   └─ Escalation contacts + Emergency protocol
   └─ Weekly risk review template (copy & fill each Friday)
   └─ Key metrics to track + Red lines (thresholds)

✅ RISK_MANAGEMENT_INDEX.md (3,000 words)
   └─ Navigation guide + Governance structure
   └─ How to use the documents (decision framework)
   └─ Risk review cadence (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly)
   └─ Team roles & responsibilities
   └─ Continuous improvement process
   └─ FAQ + Team onboarding checklist
   └─ Success criteria for risk management

================================================================================
13 CRITICAL RISKS IDENTIFIED & ADDRESSED
================================================================================

🔴 RED RISKS (Highest Priority - Immediate Escalation)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

1. MARKET RISK: TAM Smaller Than Expected
   ├─ Impact: 40-60% revenue reduction if triggered
   ├─ Probability: Medium (20-30%)
   ├─ Trigger: Response rate <3% OR 80%+ "not a fit" in discovery
   ├─ First action: Diagnosis call (CEO + VP Sales) within 2 hours
   ├─ Contingency: Test alternative messaging/segment/customer problem
   └─ Timeline: Clarity within 5 days; decision within 7 days

2. CUSTOMER IMPLEMENTATION CRISIS
   ├─ Impact: Delays reference case study 4-8 weeks; kills deal momentum
   ├─ Probability: Medium-High (35-45%)
   ├─ Trigger: Customer satisfaction <6/10 OR implementation >7 days behind
   ├─ First action: Assessment call + fix plan within 24 hours
   ├─ Contingency: Scope reduction OR feature deferral OR timeline extension
   └─ Timeline: Issue resolution within 1-4 weeks

3. CASH RISK: Burn Rate Higher Than Expected
   ├─ Impact: Runway reduced from 14 months to 10 months
   ├─ Probability: High (40-50%)
   ├─ Trigger: Burn rate >$42K/month OR runway <10 months
   ├─ First action: Cost analysis (4 hours) + quick wins (<$10K reduction)
   ├─ Contingency: GCP negotiation + tool consolidation + hiring pause
   └─ Timeline: Cost cuts within 1 week; extended runway verified

4. SALES PIPELINE STALLS
   ├─ Impact: Extends first revenue from Week 7 to Week 10+
   ├─ Probability: High (40-50%)
   ├─ Trigger: Week 7 target unmet OR <5 deals in final negotiation
   ├─ First action: Root cause analysis + CEO sales blitz (Week 8)
   ├─ Contingency: CEO personal calls + offer incentives + activate advisors
   └─ Timeline: Closure decision within 5 days; recovery plan by Week 8

5. COMPETITOR ENTERS DEAL
   ├─ Impact: Extends sales cycle 40-60%; reduces win rate by 40-70%
   ├─ Probability: Medium (25-35%)
   ├─ Trigger: Customer mentions competitor OR deal stalls >45 days
   ├─ First action: Intelligence gathering (2 hours) + positioning brief
   ├─ Contingency: Customer commitment call OR graceful exit + pivot
   └─ Timeline: Customer decision within 60 days; recover with next customer

🟡 AMBER RISKS (Monitor & Escalate If Worsening)
────────────────────────────────────────────────

6. TECHNICAL SYSTEM DOWNTIME
   ├─ Impact: Loses customer trust; extends implementation 2-4 weeks
   ├─ Probability: Medium (30-40%)
   ├─ Trigger: Production downtime >10 minutes OR data corruption detected
   ├─ First action: Declare P0 incident; page CTO immediately
   ├─ Contingency: Rollback OR hot-fix OR database restore OR failover
   └─ Timeline: Resolution within 1-4 hours (depends on severity)

7. KEY TEAM MEMBER LEAVES
   ├─ Impact: 2-4 week delay in critical work area
   ├─ Probability: Medium (25-35%)
   ├─ Trigger: Key person resigns OR signals departure
   ├─ First action: Retention attempt within 1 hour
   ├─ Contingency: Fast-track hiring OR interim coverage + knowledge transfer
   └─ Timeline: New hire starts within 2-4 weeks; overlap for transition

8. MISSING CRITICAL FEATURE
   ├─ Impact: Implementation stalls 4-6 weeks OR blocks go-live
   ├─ Probability: Medium-High (40-50%)
   ├─ Trigger: Customer blocks on feature OR can't integrate
   ├─ First action: Triage (is it P0/blocking?) within 4 hours
   ├─ Contingency: Build (if P0) OR workaround (if P1) OR defer (if P2)
   └─ Timeline: Decision within 24 hours; execution within 1-3 weeks

9. CUSTOMER COMPLIANCE BLOCKER
   ├─ Impact: Deal blocked OR timeline extended 4-8 weeks
   ├─ Probability: Medium (25-35%)
   ├─ Trigger: Auditor rejects OR insurance unavailable OR SOC 2 required
   ├─ First action: Problem assessment within 24 hours
   ├─ Contingency: Get SOC 2 Type I OR auditor exception OR risk waiver
   └─ Timeline: Resolution within 2-4 weeks

🟢 YELLOW RISKS (Regular Monitoring - Low Priority)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────

10. REGULATORY/INSURANCE
    ├─ Impact: Deal blocked without insurance/compliance cert
    ├─ Probability: Low-Medium (15-25%)
    └─ Contingency: Alternative carriers OR self-insurance

11. HIGHER CUSTOMER CHURN
    ├─ Impact: Kills long-term economics
    ├─ Probability: Medium (25-35%)
    └─ Contingency: Intensive customer success + feature deployment

12. ECONOMIC DOWNTURN
    ├─ Impact: Extends sales cycle + reduces ACV
    ├─ Probability: Low (15-20%)
    └─ Contingency: Messaging pivot + cost structure adjustment

13. EXECUTION: KEY MILESTONE MISSED
    ├─ Impact: Each week slip extends entire timeline
    ├─ Probability: High (40-50%)
    └─ Contingency: Root cause analysis + replan + acceleration

================================================================================
RISK SEVERITY MATRIX (At-a-Glance)
================================================================================

RISK #  | Risk Name                    | Impact    | Prob  | Severity | Owner
────────┼──────────────────────────────┼───────────┼───────┼──────────┼─────────
1       | Market TAM                   | CRITICAL  | MED   | 🔴 RED   | VP Sales
2       | Competitor Response          | HIGH      | MED   | 🟡 AMBER | CEO
3       | Customer Implementation      | CRITICAL  | MED   | 🔴 RED   | VP CS
4       | Cash/Burn Rate               | CRITICAL  | MED   | 🔴 RED   | CFO
5       | Team Departure               | HIGH      | MED   | 🟡 AMBER | CEO
6       | Technical/Downtime           | HIGH      | MED   | 🟡 AMBER | CTO
7       | Regulatory/Insurance         | MEDIUM    | LOW   | 🟢 YEL   | Legal
8       | Sales Pipeline Slow          | HIGH      | HIGH  | 🔴 RED   | VP Sales
9       | Missing Feature              | MEDIUM    | HIGH  | 🟡 AMBER | CTO
10      | Funding/Series A             | HIGH      | LOW   | 🟢 YEL   | CEO
11      | Customer Churn               | MEDIUM    | MED   | 🟢 YEL   | VP CS
12      | Economic Downturn            | HIGH      | LOW   | 🟢 YEL   | CEO
13      | Milestone Miss               | MEDIUM    | HIGH  | 🟢 YEL   | CEO

================================================================================
HOW TO USE THESE DOCUMENTS
================================================================================

SCENARIO 1: Strategic Planning
├─ Document: RISK_MANAGEMENT.md
├─ Time: 45-60 minutes
└─ Outcome: Understand all risks + mitigation strategies

SCENARIO 2: Weekly Risk Review (Friday EOD)
├─ Document: RISK_CONTINGENCY_QUICK_REFERENCE.md
├─ Time: 60 minutes (1 hour meeting)
├─ Attendees: CEO, VP Sales, CTO, VP CS, CFO
└─ Outcome: Filled-in weekly template sent to board

SCENARIO 3: Crisis Mode (Risk Triggered)
├─ Document: RISK_CONTINGENCY_QUICK_REFERENCE.md + CONTINGENCY_PROCEDURES.md
├─ Time: 5 minutes (identify trigger) + 30 minutes (execute immediate response)
├─ Owner: Risk owner + CEO
└─ Outcome: Contingency activated; timeline established

SCENARIO 4: New Team Member Onboarding
├─ Documents: All 4 (start with INDEX)
├─ Time: 1-2 hours
└─ Outcome: Team member understands risk framework + their role

================================================================================
KEY ACTIONS STARTING WEEK 1
================================================================================

IMMEDIATE (This Week):
✅ Print RISK_CONTINGENCY_QUICK_REFERENCE.md → Post at desk of all execs
✅ Schedule weekly risk review: Friday 4-5 PM EST (recurring)
✅ Fill in escalation contacts: [Names + phone numbers]
✅ Read RISK_MANAGEMENT.md executive summary (CEO, VP Sales, CTO)
✅ Assign risk owners: Who owns each of 13 risks?

WEEK 1-2:
✅ Share RISK_MANAGEMENT.md with board members (read before meeting)
✅ Conduct first risk assessment: How many risks are RED/AMBER/YELLOW right now?
✅ Set up contingency budget tracking: $35K allocated + monitoring
✅ Create weekly risk dashboard: Live spreadsheet for tracking metrics

ONGOING (Every Week):
✅ Friday 4-5 PM: Risk review meeting (all execs)
✅ Track red line metrics: Response rate, pipeline, burn, NPS, uptime
✅ Escalate if RED: Within 24 hours to board
✅ Update weekly template: Share with board
✅ Contingency readiness: If a risk activated, we execute within 24-48 hours

================================================================================
CONTINGENCY BUDGET ALLOCATION ($35K)
================================================================================

$35,000 contingency fund available for rapid response:

Emergency Hiring (Recruiting Fees):        $8,000
├─ Rush recruitment if key person leaves
├─ Expedited interview process
└─ Signing bonus if needed

Tech Crisis Response (Engineers):          $10,000
├─ Contractor acceleration if bugs found
├─ Product feature gap rapid build
└─ Infrastructure emergency support

Customer Crisis Support:                   $5,000
├─ Implementation overrun support
├─ Intensive onboarding services
└─ Reference customer retention

Legal/Regulatory/Compliance:               $5,000
├─ SOC 2 certification acceleration
├─ Insurance quote shopping
└─ Regulatory emergency support

Sales/Marketing Blitz:                     $4,000
├─ Travel for in-person meetings
├─ Event sponsorships
└─ Sales acceleration campaigns

Miscellaneous/Unplanned:                  $3,000
├─ Unexpected expenses
└─ Emergency supplies

TOTAL: $35,000

Rule: <$5K decision = Risk owner + CEO approval
      $5K-$15K = CEO approval + board notification
      >$15K = Board approval before spending

================================================================================
WEEKLY METRICS TO TRACK
================================================================================

SALES & PIPELINE:
├─ Cold outreach response rate (target: >5%)
├─ Discovery calls/week (target: 10+)
├─ Deals in final negotiation (target: 3+)
├─ Pipeline value (target: $200K+)
└─ RED LINE: <3% response rate → Activate Contingency 1

CASH & BURN:
├─ Burn rate/week (target: <$8.75K)
├─ Runway remaining (target: 12+ months)
├─ Actual spend vs. budget by category
└─ RED LINE: >$42K/month → Activate Contingency 4

CUSTOMER & SATISFACTION:
├─ Customer satisfaction / NPS (target: >50)
├─ Churn rate (target: 0% in early stage)
├─ Implementation timeline status
└─ RED LINE: Satisfaction <6/10 → Activate Contingency 3

TECHNICAL & OPERATIONS:
├─ Production uptime % (target: >99.9%)
├─ Production incidents (target: 0)
├─ Latency p99 (target: <100ms)
└─ RED LINE: Downtime >10 min → Activate Contingency 6

EXECUTION & TIMELINE:
├─ Milestone status (on track? ±1 week? >1 week late?)
├─ Team sentiment (any red flags?)
├─ Board confidence (feedback from monthly meeting)
└─ RED LINE: >1 week behind → Activate Contingency 13

================================================================================
ESCALATION PROTOCOL
================================================================================

Severity Thresholds:
<$10K impact        → Risk owner decides + inform CEO (same day)
$10K-$50K impact    → Risk owner + CEO decide + inform board (same day)
>$50K impact        → CEO + board decide immediately (same day)
>1 week slip        → Automatic board notification (same day)
Production incident → CTO decides; CEO informs board (within 2 hours)
Team departure      → CEO decides; board notification (same day)

Chain of Command:
Risk Owner (VP/Exec) → CEO → Lead Investor → Full Board

Notification Method:
Severity: Email (15 min) + Phone call (4 hours) + Board meeting (24 hours)

================================================================================
SUCCESS CRITERIA FOR RISK MANAGEMENT
================================================================================

How We Know This System Is Working:

✅ Detection: Risks detected within 24h of warning signal (vs. 1 week before)
✅ Escalation: RED risks escalated to board same day (not delayed)
✅ Execution: Contingencies activated within 24-48 hours (when needed)
✅ Learning: Each contingency results in playbook improvement
✅ Prevention: Risks prevented/mitigated before escalation (best case)
✅ Team Confidence: Team feels prepared + supported (survey annually)
✅ Investor Confidence: Board trusts our risk management (feedback)
✅ Business Impact: Minimize impact when risks do materialize

    └─ Executive overview

└─ Email: Risk documents distributed to exec team + board

================================================================================
NEXT STEPS
================================================================================

IMMEDIATE (Today):
☐ Share this summary with CEO + exec team
☐ Print RISK_CONTINGENCY_QUICK_REFERENCE.md (3 copies minimum)
☐ Post printed reference at desks of CEO, VP Sales, CTO, CFO
☐ Schedule first weekly risk review: Friday 4-5 PM EST
☐ Fill in escalation contacts (names + phone)

THIS WEEK:
☐ CEO reads RISK_MANAGEMENT.md executive summary (30 min)
☐ VP Sales reads Market + Sales + Competitor contingencies (20 min)
☐ CTO reads Technical + Product + Team contingencies (20 min)
☐ CFO reads Cash + Funding contingencies (15 min)
☐ Board members read executive summary + risk matrix (15 min)

BEFORE WEEK 1 ENDS:
☐ First risk assessment completed: Which risks are RED/AMBER/YELLOW now?
☐ Risk owners assigned: Clear owner for each of 13 risks
☐ Contingency fund established: $35K set aside + monitoring process
☐ Weekly review process documented: Template, attendees, time, outputs

ONGOING:
☐ Every Friday: Risk review meeting (1 hour)
☐ Every month: Board risk update (15-20 minutes in meeting)
☐ Every quarter: Full risk reassessment + document updates
☐ Anytime: Contingency activation (within 24-48 hours of trigger)

================================================================================
KEY REMINDERS
================================================================================

✅ When in doubt, escalate immediately (not "let's wait and see")

✅ Transparency wins (be honest with board, customers, team)

✅ Speed of response matters more than perfection (act decisively)

✅ Most contingencies need 24-48 hour response (not a week)

✅ Document everything (postmortem + lessons learned)

✅ Keep the mission in focus (first revenue by Week 13)

✅ Hope for the best, plan for the worst

✅ Execute with urgency when risks trigger

Status: READY FOR IMMEDIATE USE
Next Quarterly Review: February 23, 2026

Questions? Contact: CEO
Ready to use? Print QUICK_REFERENCE.md and post at desk.

"Hope for the best. Plan for the worst. Execute with urgency."
